title: Mortis
description: Mortis is a configurable death system for manipulating items after death.
body:
# Mortis

Mortis is a datapack that handles everything from cosmetics, to convenience, with your items after you die. 

# Quick start guide

Type in chat "/function mortis:gamerule/" and tab/autofill to see what the options for gamerules are.

# Gamerule list

## HeadDisplay: 
A skull will appear where the player died. If the player died with a skull on, the skull will appear as the one the player wore. If the player didn't wear a skull when dying, the skull will resemble a skeleton skull.

## ShowLastDeathCoordinates: 
Tells the player in chat where they died.

## SaveItemsFromVoid: 
If the player takes damage in the void, they will die and keep their items. If the player is on half a heart in the void, they will die and keep their items.

## ItemInvulnerability: 
Items will not despawn or take damage.

## ItemClumping: 
All items clump together at the location of death.

## ItemAntiGravity: 
Disables item gravity. (best if used with the ItemClumping gamerule)

## OwnerItems: 
Items will not be able to be collected by anyone but the one who died with them.

# /trigger commands

## /trigger mortis.DeathCount: 

Tells the player in chat how many times they have died.

## /trigger mortis.LastDeathCoordinates: 

Tells the player in chat where they last died.

# Administrator features:

## Exclusionary tags:

If you give any player a tag like this: "mortis.x.false" replacing the "x" with whatever gamerule you want to exclude them from in all lowercase, then that gamerule will not apply to them even if enabled.

# Beta stuff

Nothing at the moment.

# QnA

- Q: Can I copy/modify the code in your datapack/mod?  
- A: As long as you don't distribute the modded version, you may use any or all of my code, as long as appropriate credit is given.

- Q: Can I use this pack on my public/private server?  
- A: Go right ahead. I do not care what you do with this on any server.
